21:39 â November 2, 2021
Update to Form 1770, Authorized Signing Officer Signature Update
We revised the Authorized Signing Officer Signature Update, Form 1770, as follows:
We provided new transmittal instructions. The form can be sent to Central 1 as an attachment to a ServiceNow ticket or via email. We removed references to sending the form via registered mail or courier.
We added an optional section for listing signing officer restrictions (i.e., where the restrictions apply to all signing officers on the form). Some financial institutions currently send Central 1 specific instructions on what signing officers can approve. This new section provides a proper space to do that.
We updated the âSignatureâ column to âPhysical Signatureâ to indicate that signing officers must provide physical signatures. Electronic signatures arenât permitted on this form.
We removed the corporate seal section as itâs no longer required.
